zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Plumpton IV於大約1340年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，他的父親William de Plumpton47歲，母親Christina Mowbray36歲。他於1363年與Isabella Scrope在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1407年在英國越可爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Plumpton IV was born about 1340, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, his father, William de Plumpton, was 47 and his mother, Christina Mowbray, was 36. He married Isabella Scrope in 1363, in Masham, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1407, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Plumpton IV est né environ 1340, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William de Plumpton, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Christina Mowbray, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Scrope en 1363, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1407, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Plumpton IVが約1340年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで生まれた時，父William de Plumptonは47歳，母Christina Mowbrayは36歳であった。1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムでIsabella Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1407年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Plumpton IV(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Plumpton(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Mowbray(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1363년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 Isabella Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1407년 영국 요르크실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Plumpton IV родился около 1340 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Plumpton было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Mowbray, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Scrope в 1363 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1407 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
